title: Skill Package
description: Schema for a package manifest in catalog/packages/. A package bundles one or more assets from a work stream so they can be delivered as a cohesive unit through the portal.

name.description: Human-readable package name shown in the portal

workstream.description: The primary work stream this package serves

entry_asset.description: Asset ID of the primary skill or agent that is the package entry point

assets.description: All assets bundled in this package, explicitly stating which sub-folder each comes from.

id.description: Asset ID matching the id field in the asset front matter

role.description: Semantic role of this asset within the package

source_folder.description: Which sub-folder this asset was drawn from

path.description: Relative path from repo root to the asset file

required.description: Whether this asset is mandatory for the package to function

delivery_modes.description: How this package can be consumed. Differentiates current IDE use from future portal/API delivery.

mode.description: copilot-chat = current IDE use; api-endpoint/mcp-tool/copilot-studio/in-house-llm = future portal delivery

availability.description: current = works today; planned = roadmap item

instructions.description: Brief usage instructions specific to this delivery mode

endpoint.description: Placeholder URL for API/MCP endpoint (use {{PLACEHOLDER}} format for real values)

configuration.description: Default model configuration for this package
